_about: Scripted FakeCompleter responses for tests/test_selfheal_e2e.py. Hand-authored, NOT recorded from a real model. '{BASE}' is replaced with the fixture server's ephemeral http://127.0.0.1:<port> at load time. The list is ORDERED: it is replayed positionally by a plain FakeCompleter, so the order below is exactly the order the engine calls complete() during step 2 (drift -> T2 fallback serve, then the inline regeneration Loop).

responses.note: loop codegen candidate #1 (k=2): a crawler for the MUTATED layout
responses.text:
```python
from parsel import Selector
from crawloop.contract import Crawler, CrawlResult, FetchContext


class BooksListV2(Crawler):
    family = "127.0.0.1/product_list"
    schema_ref = "Product@1"

    async def crawl(self, url: str, ctx: FetchContext) -> CrawlResult:
        html = await ctx.fetch(url)
        sel = Selector(text=html)
        items = []
        for card in sel.css("div.card"):
            avail = ctx.clean_text(" ".join(card.css(".stock::text").getall())) or ""
            items.append({
                "name": card.css("h3 a::attr(title)").get(),
                "price": ctx.parse_money(card.css(".price-box::text").get()),
                "in_stock": "In stock" in avail,
                "url": ctx.absolutize(url, card.css("h3 a::attr(href)").get()),
            })
        next_href = sel.css("div.pager-next a::attr(href)").get()
        return CrawlResult(items=items, next_url=ctx.absolutize(url, next_href))
```

responses.text:
```python
from parsel import Selector
from crawloop.contract import Crawler, CrawlResult, FetchContext


class BooksListV2(Crawler):
    family = "127.0.0.1/product_list"
    schema_ref = "Product@1"

    async def crawl(self, url: str, ctx: FetchContext) -> CrawlResult:
        html = await ctx.fetch(url)
        sel = Selector(text=html)
        items = []
        for card in sel.css("div.card"):
            avail = ctx.clean_text(" ".join(card.css(".stock::text").getall())) or ""
            items.append({
                "name": card.css("h3 a::attr(title)").get(),
                "price": ctx.parse_money(card.css(".price-box::text").get()),
                "in_stock": "In stock" in avail,
                "url": ctx.absolutize(url, card.css("h3 a::attr(href)").get()),
            })
        next_href = sel.css("div.pager-next a::attr(href)").get()
        return CrawlResult(items=items, next_url=ctx.absolutize(url, next_href))
```
